title: Restore RB Order Logic

requirements.text: Restore the RB (Return/Replenishment Buy) order logic so that RB-type orders are correctly handled throughout the order lifecycle: they must be distinguishable from CO-type orders, display correctly in the TotalOrdersTab grouped view, support the SuppliedQtyDialog partial-supply flow (remaining units stay as Pending), and transition through status stages (Pending → Ready → Hallmark → ReturnFromHallmark) without regression.
acceptanceCriteria: RB-type orders appear in TotalOrdersTab and can be distinguished from CO-type orders.
Selecting RB orders and triggering supply opens the SuppliedQtyDialog, allowing partial quantities to be supplied while remaining units remain as Pending.
Fully supplied RB orders transition to Ready status correctly.
RB orders flow through Hallmark and ReturnFromHallmark status stages without errors.
CO-type order flows are unaffected by the RB logic restoration.
No regression in existing order status transitions or filtering.

constraints: Apply only Task 4 (Restore RB Order Logic) — do not bundle other pending tasks (Master Design → Karigar Sync, Karigar Export PDF, Desktop Sidebar Layout Fix) into this build.
Base changes on Draft 175 as the starting point.
